title: Check Completeness of a Binary Tree

testcases.input: root = [1,2,3,4,5,6] Output: true Explanation: Every level before the last is full (ie. levels with node-values {1} and {2, 3}), and all nodes in the last level ({4, 5, 6}) are as far left as possible.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Every level before the last is full (ie. levels with node-values {1} and {2, 3}), and all nodes in the last level ({4, 5, 6}) are as far left as possible.

testcases.input: root = [1,2,3,4,5,null,7] Output: false Explanation: The node with value 7 isn't as far left as possible.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The node with value 7 isn't as far left as possible.
